title: pilosella auriculoides subsp. pseudotanythrix
intro: Pilosella auriculoides subsp. pseudotanythrix is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is commonly known as a type of hawkweed. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pilosella auriculoides subsp. pseudotanythrix include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
